lines: Population. China dominates with 1.4 billion people. The USA has 340 million.
GDP. The United States takes this one at 28.8 trillion dollars. China follows with 18.5 trillion.
Land Area. China edges ahead with 9.6 million square kilometers. The US has 9.8 million. USA wins.
Military Personnel. China leads with over 2 million active soldiers. The US has 1.4 million.
Nuclear Warheads. The USA dominates with 5,550 warheads. China has just 500.
Olympic Medals. The USA leads all time with 2,636 medals. China has 696.
Internet Users. China wins with 1.05 billion users. The US has 312 million.
Life Expectancy. It's extremely close. China at 78 years, USA at 77.
The final score. Four to four. It's a perfect tie!
